revision.text:
{{神社 |名称=他田坐天照御魂神社 |画像=[[Image:DOPtsTKVoAA10H.jpg|280px]]
拝殿 |所在地=[[奈良県]][[桜井市]]太田205 |位置={{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|32|44|N|135|50|21|E|region:JP-29_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神=天照御魂命 |社格=[[式内社]]（大）[[論社]]
旧[[村社]] |創建=（伝）[[敏達天皇]]11年（[[586年]]） |本殿=[[春日造]] |例祭=[[10月10日]] |神事= }} '''他田坐天照御魂神社'''（おさだにますあまてるみたまじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[桜井市]]にある[[神社]]である。[[式内大社]]で、旧[[社格]]は[[村社]]。 == 歴史 == === 概史 === かつてこの地には[[敏達天皇]]の宮である訳語田幸玉宮（おさたのさきたまのみや）があったとされ、当社は敏達天皇が設置した日祀部が置かれた場所とされる（但し訳語田幸玉宮の所在地は桜井市戒重の[[春日神社（桜井市）|春日神社]]だとする説もある）。[[延喜式神名帳]]では大社に列格していたが、それ以後史上から姿を消し、[[江戸時代]]には春日神社と名乗っていた。 === 神階 === [[貞観]]元年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]従五位下より従五位上『[[日本三代実録]]』 - 表記は「他田天照御魂神」 == 祭神 == '''天照御魂命'''
祭神の正体は諸説存在する。 *『神祇宝典』天照大神之荒魂 *『神社覈録』天日神命 *『神名帳考証』天照国照彦火明命・志貴連祖饒速日命 *『特選神名牒』天火明命 == 関連項目 == [[敏達天皇]] == 外部リンク == [http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031105-01.html 他田坐天照御魂神社]

旧[[村社]] |創建=（伝）[[敏達天皇]]11年（[[586年]]） |本殿= [[春日造]] |例祭= [[10月10日]] |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} {{右|[[画像:DOPuNorU8AEd73Q.jpg|none|thumb|250px|神社遠景]]}} {{右|[[画像:DCH56w0VoAAUHDH.jpg|none|thumb|250px|本殿]]}} '''他田坐天照御魂神社'''（おさだにますあまてるみたまじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[桜井市]]にある[[神社]]である。[[式内大社]]で、旧[[社格]]は[[村社]]。 == 歴史 == === 概史 === かつてこの地には[[敏達天皇]]の宮である訳語田幸玉宮（おさたのさきたまのみや）があったとされ、当社は敏達天皇が設置した日祀部が置かれた場所とされる（但し訳語田幸玉宮の所在地は桜井市戒重の[[春日神社（桜井市）|春日神社]]だとする説もある）。[[延喜式神名帳]]では大社に列格していたが、それ以後史上から姿を消し、[[江戸時代]]には春日神社と名乗っていた。 === 神階 === [[貞観 (日本)|貞観]]元年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]従五位下より従五位上『[[日本三代実録]]』 - 表記は「他田天照御魂神」 == 祭神 == '''天照御魂命'''
祭神の正体は諸説存在する。 *『神祇宝典』天照大神之荒魂 *『神社覈録』天日神命 *『神名帳考証』天照国照彦火明命・志貴連祖饒速日命 *『特選神名牒』天火明命 == 関連項目 == [[敏達天皇]] == 外部リンク == [http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031105-01.html 他田坐天照御魂神社] {{DEFAULTSORT:おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや}} [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]]

{{神社 |名称= 他田坐天照御魂神社 |画像= [[Image:他田坐天照御魂神社 - DCH56BGVoAAu3-m.jpg|280px]]
拝殿 |所在地= [[奈良県]][[桜井市]]太田205 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 32 | 緯度秒 = 45.8 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 50 | 経度秒 = 21 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神= 天照御魂命 |社格= [[式内社]]（大）[[論社]]
旧[[村社]] |創建=（伝）[[敏達天皇]]11年（[[586年]]） |本殿= [[春日造]] |例祭= [[10月10日]] |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社 DOPuNorU8AEd73Q.jpg|none|thumb|250px|神社遠景]]}} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社本殿 - DCH56w0VoAAUHDH.jpg|none|thumb|250px|本殿]]}} '''他田坐天照御魂神社'''（おさだにますあまてるみたまじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[桜井市]]にある[[神社]]である。[[式内大社]]で、旧[[社格]]は[[村社]]。 == 歴史 == === 概史 === かつてこの地には[[敏達天皇]]の宮である訳語田幸玉宮（おさたのさきたまのみや）があったとされ、当社は敏達天皇が設置した[[日奉部|日祀部]]が置かれた場所とされる（但し訳語田幸玉宮の所在地は桜井市戒重の[[春日神社（桜井市）|春日神社]]だとする説もある）。[[延喜式神名帳]]では大社に列格していたが、それ以後史上から姿を消し、[[江戸時代]]には春日神社と名乗っていた。 === 神階 === *[[天安 (日本)|天安]]3年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]、従五位下より従五位上（『[[日本三代実録]]』）- 表記は「他田天照御魂神」 == 祭神 == '''天照御魂命'''
祭神の正体は諸説存在する。 *『神祇宝典』天照大神之荒魂 *『[[神社覈録]]』天日神命 *『[[神名帳考証]]』天照国照彦火明命・志貴連祖饒速日命 *『[[特選神名牒]]』[[天火明命]] == 関連項目 == *[[敏達天皇]] == 外部リンク == *{{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031105-01.html |title=他田坐天照御魂神社 |date=20181001130453}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや}} [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]]

{{nihongo|'''Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine'''|他田坐天照御魂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine'''|他田坐天照御魂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine'''|他田坐天照御魂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine'''|他田坐天照御魂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine'''|他田坐天照御魂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine'''|他田坐天照御魂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine'''|他田坐天照御魂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine'''|他田坐天照御魂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine'''|他田坐天照御魂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine'''|他田坐天照御魂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine'''|他田坐天照御魂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine'''|他田坐天照御魂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

revision.comment: 25 revisions imported
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称= 他田坐天照御魂神社 |画像= [[Image:他田坐天照御魂神社 - DCH56BGVoAAu3-m.jpg|270px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270|frame-height=240}} |所在地= [[奈良県]][[桜井市]]太田205 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 32 | 緯度秒 = 45.8 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 50 | 経度秒 = 21 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神= [[アマテラス|天照御魂命]] |社格= [[式内社]]（大）[[論社]]
旧[[村社]] |創建=（伝）[[敏達天皇]]11年（[[586年]]） |本殿= [[春日造]] |例祭= [[10月10日]] |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社 DOPuNorU8AEd73Q.jpg|none|thumb|250px|神社遠景]]}} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社本殿 - DCH56w0VoAAUHDH.jpg|none|thumb|250px|本殿]]}} '''他田坐天照御魂神社'''（おさだにますあまてるみたまじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[桜井市]]にある[[神社]]である。[[式内大社]]で、旧[[社格]]は[[村社]]。 == 歴史 == === 概史 === かつてこの地には[[敏達天皇]]の宮である訳語田幸玉宮（おさたのさきたまのみや）があったとされ、当社は敏達天皇が設置した[[日奉部|日祀部]]が置かれた場所とされる（但し訳語田幸玉宮の所在地は桜井市戒重の[[春日神社（桜井市）|春日神社]]だとする説もある）。[[延喜式神名帳]]では大社に列格していたが、それ以後史上から姿を消し、[[江戸時代]]には春日神社と名乗っていた。 === 神階 === *[[天安 (日本)|天安]]3年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]、従五位下より従五位上（『[[日本三代実録]]』）- 表記は「他田天照御魂神」 == 祭神 == '''天照御魂命'''
祭神の正体は諸説存在する。 *『神祇宝典』天照大神之荒魂 *『[[神社覈録]]』天日神命 *『[[神名帳考証]]』天照国照彦火明命・志貴連祖饒速日命 *『[[特選神名牒]]』[[天火明命]] == 関連項目 == *[[敏達天皇]] == 交通 == *JR桜井線[[巻向駅]]より約300m ([[纏向遺跡]]辻地区の西に隣接) == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == *{{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031105-01.html |title=他田坐天照御魂神社 |date=20181001130453}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや}} [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]]

Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称= 他田坐天照御魂神社 |画像= [[Image:他田坐天照御魂神社 - DCH56BGVoAAu3-m.jpg|270px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270|frame-height=240}} |所在地= [[奈良県]][[桜井市]]太田205 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 32 | 緯度秒 = 45.8 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 50 | 経度秒 = 21 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神= [[アマテラス|天照御魂命]] |社格= [[式内社]]（大）[[論社]]
旧[[村社]] |創建=（伝）[[敏達天皇]]11年（[[586年]]） |本殿= [[春日造]] |例祭= [[10月10日]] |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社 DOPuNorU8AEd73Q.jpg|none|thumb|250px|神社遠景]]}} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社本殿 - DCH56w0VoAAUHDH.jpg|none|thumb|250px|本殿]]}} '''他田坐天照御魂神社'''（おさだにますあまてるみたまじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[桜井市]]にある[[神社]]である。[[式内大社]]で、旧[[社格]]は[[村社]]。 == 歴史 == === 概史 === かつてこの地には[[敏達天皇]]の宮である訳語田幸玉宮（おさたのさきたまのみや）があったとされ、当社は敏達天皇が設置した[[日奉部|日祀部]]が置かれた場所とされる（但し訳語田幸玉宮の所在地は桜井市戒重の[[春日神社（桜井市）|春日神社]]だとする説もある）。[[延喜式神名帳]]では大社に列格していたが、それ以後史上から姿を消し、[[江戸時代]]には春日神社と名乗っていた。 === 神階 === *[[天安 (日本)|天安]]3年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]、従五位下より従五位上（『[[日本三代実録]]』）- 表記は「他田天照御魂神」 == 祭神 == '''天照御魂命'''
祭神の正体は諸説存在する。 *『神祇宝典』天照大神之荒魂 *『[[神社覈録]]』天日神命 *『[[神名帳考証]]』天照国照彦火明命・志貴連祖饒速日命 *『[[特選神名牒]]』[[天火明命]] == 関連項目 == *[[敏達天皇]] == 交通 == *JR桜井線[[巻向駅]]より約300m ([[纏向遺跡]]辻地区の西に隣接) == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == *{{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031105-01.html |title=他田坐天照御魂神社 |date=20181001130453}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや}} [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] ==End Japanese==

Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称= 他田坐天照御魂神社 |画像= [[Image:他田坐天照御魂神社 - DCH56BGVoAAu3-m.jpg|270px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270|frame-height=240}} |所在地= [[奈良県]][[桜井市]]太田205 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 32 | 緯度秒 = 45.8 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 50 | 経度秒 = 21 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神= [[アマテラス|天照御魂命]] |社格= [[式内社]]（大）[[論社]]
旧[[村社]] |創建=（伝）[[敏達天皇]]11年（[[586年]]） |本殿= [[春日造]] |例祭= [[10月10日]] |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社 DOPuNorU8AEd73Q.jpg|none|thumb|250px|神社遠景]]}} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社本殿 - DCH56w0VoAAUHDH.jpg|none|thumb|250px|本殿]]}} '''他田坐天照御魂神社'''（おさだにますあまてるみたまじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[桜井市]]にある[[神社]]である。[[式内大社]]で、旧[[社格]]は[[村社]]。 == 歴史 == === 概史 === かつてこの地には[[敏達天皇]]の宮である訳語田幸玉宮（おさたのさきたまのみや）があったとされ、当社は敏達天皇が設置した[[日奉部|日祀部]]が置かれた場所とされる（但し訳語田幸玉宮の所在地は桜井市戒重の[[春日神社（桜井市）|春日神社]]だとする説もある）。[[延喜式神名帳]]では大社に列格していたが、それ以後史上から姿を消し、[[江戸時代]]には春日神社と名乗っていた。 === 神階 === *[[天安 (日本)|天安]]3年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]、従五位下より従五位上（『[[日本三代実録]]』）- 表記は「他田天照御魂神」 == 祭神 == '''天照御魂命'''
祭神の正体は諸説存在する。 *『神祇宝典』天照大神之荒魂 *『[[神社覈録]]』天日神命 *『[[神名帳考証]]』天照国照彦火明命・志貴連祖饒速日命 *『[[特選神名牒]]』[[天火明命]] == 関連項目 == *[[敏達天皇]] == 交通 == *JR桜井線[[巻向駅]]より約300m ([[纏向遺跡]]辻地区の西に隣接) == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == *{{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031105-01.html |title=他田坐天照御魂神社 |date=20181001130453}} {{神道 横}} [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] ==End Japanese==

祭神の正体は諸説存在する。 *『神祇宝典』天照大神之荒魂 *『[[神社覈録]]』天日神命 *『[[神名帳考証]]』天照国照彦火明命・志貴連祖饒速日命 *『[[特選神名牒]]』[[天火明命]] == 関連項目 == *[[敏達天皇]] == 交通 == *JR桜井線[[巻向駅]]より約300m ([[纏向遺跡]]辻地区の西に隣接) == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == *{{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031105-01.html |title=他田坐天照御魂神社 |date=20181001130453}} {{神道 横}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]]

[[Category:Kanpei-sha]] {{translated page|ja|他田坐天照御魂神社|version=106919406|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称= 他田坐天照御魂神社 |画像= [[Image:他田坐天照御魂神社 - DCH56BGVoAAu3-m.jpg|270px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270|frame-height=240}} |所在地= [[奈良県]][[桜井市]]太田205 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 32 | 緯度秒 = 45.8 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 50 | 経度秒 = 21 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神= [[アマテラス|天照御魂命]] |社格= [[式内社]]（大）[[論社]]
旧[[村社]] |創建=（伝）[[敏達天皇]]11年（[[586年]]） |本殿= [[春日造]] |例祭= [[10月10日]] |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社 DOPuNorU8AEd73Q.jpg|none|thumb|250px|神社遠景]]}} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社本殿 - DCH56w0VoAAUHDH.jpg|none|thumb|250px|本殿]]}} '''他田坐天照御魂神社'''（おさだにますあまてるみたまじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[桜井市]]にある[[神社]]である。[[式内大社]]で、旧[[社格]]は[[村社]]。 == 歴史 == === 概史 === かつてこの地には[[敏達天皇]]の宮である訳語田幸玉宮（おさたのさきたまのみや）があったとされ、当社は敏達天皇が設置した[[日奉部|日祀部]]が置かれた場所とされる（但し訳語田幸玉宮の所在地は桜井市戒重の[[春日神社（桜井市）|春日神社]]だとする説もある）。[[延喜式神名帳]]では大社に列格していたが、それ以後史上から姿を消し、[[江戸時代]]には春日神社と名乗っていた。 === 神階 === *[[天安 (日本)|天安]]3年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]、従五位下より従五位上（『[[日本三代実録]]』）- 表記は「他田天照御魂神」 == 祭神 == '''天照御魂命'''
祭神の正体は諸説存在する。 *『神祇宝典』天照大神之荒魂 *『[[神社覈録]]』天日神命 *『[[神名帳考証]]』天照国照彦火明命・志貴連祖饒速日命 *『[[特選神名牒]]』[[天火明命]] == 関連項目 == *[[敏達天皇]] == 交通 == *JR桜井線[[巻向駅]]より約300m ([[纏向遺跡]]辻地区の西に隣接) == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == *{{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031105-01.html |title=他田坐天照御魂神社 |date=20181001130453}} {{神道 横}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]]

'奈良県桜井市太田205', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Osada-nimasu-amateru-mitama-jinja}} [[JA:他田坐天照御魂神社]] {{wikidata link|Q43594600}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称= 他田坐天照御魂神社 |画像= [[Image:他田坐天照御魂神社 - DCH56BGVoAAu3-m.jpg|270px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270|frame-height=240}} |所在地= {{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|桜井市|Q127026}}太田205 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 32 | 緯度秒 = 45.8 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 50 | 経度秒 = 21 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神= {{jalink|アマテラス||天照御魂命}} |社格= {{jalink|式内社}}（大）{{jalink|論社|Q135022904}}
旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建=（伝）{{jalink|敏達天皇|Q316637}}11年（{{jalink|586年|Q32151}}） |本殿= {{jalink|春日造|Q3193781}} |例祭= {{jalink|10月10日|Q2921}} |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社 DOPuNorU8AEd73Q.jpg|none|thumb|250px|神社遠景]]}} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社本殿 - DCH56w0VoAAUHDH.jpg|none|thumb|250px|本殿]]}} '''他田坐天照御魂神社'''（おさだにますあまてるみたまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|桜井市|Q127026}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。{{jalink|式内大社|Q134917288}}で、旧{{jalink|社格|Q10444029}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}。 === 歴史 === === 概史 === かつてこの地には{{jalink|敏達天皇|Q316637}}の宮である訳語田幸玉宮（おさたのさきたまのみや）があったとされ、当社は敏達天皇が設置した{{jalink|日奉部|Q109597716|日祀部}}が置かれた場所とされる（但し訳語田幸玉宮の所在地は桜井市戒重の{{jalink|春日神社（桜井市）||春日神社}}だとする説もある）。{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}では大社に列格していたが、それ以後史上から姿を消し、{{jalink|江戸時代|Q184963}}には春日神社と名乗っていた。 === 神階 === *{{jalink|天安 (日本)|Q1075611|天安}}3年（{{jalink|859年|Q23897}}）{{jalink|1月27日|Q2284}}、従五位下より従五位上（『{{jalink|日本三代実録|Q1052981}}』）- 表記は「他田天照御魂神」 === 祭神 === '''天照御魂命'''
祭神の正体は諸説存在する。 *『神祇宝典』天照大神之荒魂 *『{{jalink|神社覈録|Q11590708}}』天日神命 *『{{jalink|神名帳考証|Q11588824}}』天照国照彦火明命・志貴連祖饒速日命 *『{{jalink|特選神名牒|Q11571092}}』{{jalink|天火明命|Q10940411}} === 関連項目 === *{{jalink|敏達天皇|Q316637}} === 交通 === *JR桜井線{{jalink|巻向駅|Q4980794}}より約300m ({{jalink|纏向遺跡}}辻地区の西に隣接) === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === *{{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031105-01.html |title=他田坐天照御魂神社 |date=20181001130453}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]]

'奈良県桜井市太田205', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Osada-nimasu-amateru-mitama-jinja}} [[JA:他田坐天照御魂神社]] {{wikidata link|Q43594600}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称= 他田坐天照御魂神社 |画像= [[Image:他田坐天照御魂神社 - DCH56BGVoAAu3-m.jpg|270px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270|frame-height=240}} |所在地= {{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|桜井市|Q127026}}太田205 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 32 | 緯度秒 = 45.8 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 50 | 経度秒 = 21 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神= {{jalink|アマテラス||天照御魂命}} |社格= {{jalink|式内社}}（大）{{jalink|論社|Q135022904}}
旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建=（伝）{{jalink|敏達天皇|Q316637}}11年（{{jalink|586年|Q32151}}） |本殿= {{jalink|春日造|Q3193781}} |例祭= {{jalink|10月10日|Q2921}} |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社 DOPuNorU8AEd73Q.jpg|none|thumb|250px|神社遠景]]}} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社本殿 - DCH56w0VoAAUHDH.jpg|none|thumb|250px|本殿]]}} '''他田坐天照御魂神社'''（おさだにますあまてるみたまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|桜井市|Q127026}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。{{jalink|式内大社|Q134917288}}で、旧{{jalink|社格|Q10444029}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}。 === 歴史 === === 概史 === かつてこの地には{{jalink|敏達天皇|Q316637}}の宮である訳語田幸玉宮（おさたのさきたまのみや）があったとされ、当社は敏達天皇が設置した{{jalink|日奉部|Q109597716|日祀部}}が置かれた場所とされる（但し訳語田幸玉宮の所在地は桜井市戒重の{{jalink|春日神社（桜井市）||春日神社}}だとする説もある）。{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}では大社に列格していたが、それ以後史上から姿を消し、{{jalink|江戸時代|Q184963}}には春日神社と名乗っていた。 === 神階 === *{{jalink|天安 (日本)|Q1075611|天安}}3年（{{jalink|859年|Q23897}}）{{jalink|1月27日|Q2284}}、従五位下より従五位上（『{{jalink|日本三代実録|Q1052981}}』）- 表記は「他田天照御魂神」 === 祭神 === '''天照御魂命'''
祭神の正体は諸説存在する。 *『神祇宝典』天照大神之荒魂 *『{{jalink|神社覈録|Q11590708}}』天日神命 *『{{jalink|神名帳考証|Q11588824}}』天照国照彦火明命・志貴連祖饒速日命 *『{{jalink|特選神名牒|Q11571092}}』{{jalink|天火明命|Q10940411}} === 関連項目 === *{{jalink|敏達天皇|Q316637}} === 交通 === *JR桜井線{{jalink|巻向駅|Q4980794}}より約300m ({{jalink|纏向遺跡}}辻地区の西に隣接) === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === *{{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031105-01.html |title=他田坐天照御魂神社 |date=20181001130453}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

'奈良県桜井市太田205', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Osada-nimasu-amateru-mitama-jinja}} [[JA:他田坐天照御魂神社]] {{wikidata link|Q43594600}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称= 他田坐天照御魂神社 |画像= [[Image:他田坐天照御魂神社 - DCH56BGVoAAu3-m.jpg|270px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270|frame-height=240}} |所在地= {{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|桜井市|Q127026}}太田205 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 32 | 緯度秒 = 45.8 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 50 | 経度秒 = 21 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神= {{jalink|アマテラス||天照御魂命}} |社格= {{jalink|式内社}}（大）{{jalink|論社|Q135022904}}
旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建=（伝）{{jalink|敏達天皇|Q316637}}11年（{{jalink|586年|Q32151}}） |本殿= {{jalink|春日造|Q3193781}} |例祭= {{jalink|10月10日|Q2921}} |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社 DOPuNorU8AEd73Q.jpg|none|thumb|250px|神社遠景]]}} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社本殿 - DCH56w0VoAAUHDH.jpg|none|thumb|250px|本殿]]}} '''他田坐天照御魂神社'''（おさだにますあまてるみたまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|桜井市|Q127026}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。{{jalink|式内大社|Q134917288}}で、旧{{jalink|社格|Q10444029}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}。 === 歴史 === === 概史 === かつてこの地には{{jalink|敏達天皇|Q316637}}の宮である訳語田幸玉宮（おさたのさきたまのみや）があったとされ、当社は敏達天皇が設置した{{jalink|日奉部|Q109597716|日祀部}}が置かれた場所とされる（但し訳語田幸玉宮の所在地は桜井市戒重の{{jalink|春日神社（桜井市）||春日神社}}だとする説もある）。{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}では大社に列格していたが、それ以後史上から姿を消し、{{jalink|江戸時代|Q184963}}には春日神社と名乗っていた。 === 神階 === *{{jalink|天安 (日本)|Q1075611|天安}}3年（{{jalink|859年|Q23897}}）{{jalink|1月27日|Q2284}}、従五位下より従五位上（『{{jalink|日本三代実録|Q1052981}}』）- 表記は「他田天照御魂神」 === 祭神 === '''天照御魂命'''
祭神の正体は諸説存在する。 *『神祇宝典』天照大神之荒魂 *『{{jalink|神社覈録|Q11590708}}』天日神命 *『{{jalink|神名帳考証|Q11588824}}』天照国照彦火明命・志貴連祖饒速日命 *『{{jalink|特選神名牒|Q11571092}}』{{jalink|天火明命|Q10940411}} === 関連項目 === *{{jalink|敏達天皇|Q316637}} === 交通 === *JR桜井線{{jalink|巻向駅|Q4980794}}より約300m ({{jalink|纏向遺跡}}辻地区の西に隣接) === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === *{{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031105-01.html |title=他田坐天照御魂神社 |date=20181001130453}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

[[Image:他田坐天照御魂神社 - DCH56BGVoAAu3-m.jpg|270px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270|frame-height=240}} |所在地= {{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|桜井市|Q127026}}太田205 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 32 | 緯度秒 = 45.8 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 50 | 経度秒 = 21 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神= {{jalink|アマテラス||天照御魂命}} |社格= {{jalink|式内社}}（大）{{jalink|論社|Q135022904}}
旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建=（伝）{{jalink|敏達天皇|Q316637}}11年（{{jalink|586年|Q32151}}） |本殿= {{jalink|春日造|Q3193781}} |例祭= {{jalink|10月10日|Q2921}} |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社 DOPuNorU8AEd73Q.jpg|none|thumb|250px|神社遠景]]}} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社本殿 - DCH56w0VoAAUHDH.jpg|none|thumb|250px|本殿]]}} '''他田坐天照御魂神社'''（おさだにますあまてるみたまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|桜井市|Q127026}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。{{jalink|式内大社|Q134917288}}で、旧{{jalink|社格|Q10444029}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}。 === 歴史 === === 概史 === かつてこの地には{{jalink|敏達天皇|Q316637}}の宮である訳語田幸玉宮（おさたのさきたまのみや）があったとされ、当社は敏達天皇が設置した{{jalink|日奉部|Q109597716|日祀部}}が置かれた場所とされる（但し訳語田幸玉宮の所在地は桜井市戒重の{{jalink|春日神社（桜井市）||春日神社}}だとする説もある）。{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}では大社に列格していたが、それ以後史上から姿を消し、{{jalink|江戸時代|Q184963}}には春日神社と名乗っていた。 === 神階 === *{{jalink|天安 (日本)|Q1075611|天安}}3年（{{jalink|859年|Q23897}}）{{jalink|1月27日|Q2284}}、従五位下より従五位上（『{{jalink|日本三代実録|Q1052981}}』）- 表記は「他田天照御魂神」 === 祭神 === '''天照御魂命'''
祭神の正体は諸説存在する。 *『神祇宝典』天照大神之荒魂 *『{{jalink|神社覈録|Q11590708}}』天日神命 *『{{jalink|神名帳考証|Q11588824}}』天照国照彦火明命・志貴連祖饒速日命 *『{{jalink|特選神名牒|Q11571092}}』{{jalink|天火明命|Q10940411}} === 関連項目 === *{{jalink|敏達天皇|Q316637}} === 交通 === *JR桜井線{{jalink|巻向駅|Q4980794}}より約300m ({{jalink|纏向遺跡}}辻地区の西に隣接) === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === *{{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031105-01.html |title=他田坐天照御魂神社 |date=20181001130453}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

Haiden (worship hall)
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270|frame-height=240}} |所在地= {{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}{{jalink|Sakurai|Q127026}} Ōta 205 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 32 | 緯度秒 = 45.8 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 50 | 経度秒 = 21 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神= {{jalink|Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto||Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto}} |社格= {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (great shrine) {{jalink|candidate shrine|Q135022904}}
former {{jalink|village shrine|Q134917284}} |創建=(trad.) {{jalink|Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637}} 11 ({{jalink|586|Q32151}}) |本殿= {{jalink|Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781}} |例祭= {{jalink|October 10|Q2921}} |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社 DOPuNorU8AEd73Q.jpg|none|thumb|250px|Distant view of the shrine]]}} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社本殿 - DCH56w0VoAAUHDH.jpg|none|thumb|250px|Honden]]}} '''Osada Nimasu Amateru-Mitama Shrine''' (おさだにますあまてるみたまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Sakurai|Q127026}}, {{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}. It is a {{jalink|shikinaisha great shrine|Q134917288}}, and its former {{jalink|shrine rank|Q10444029}} was {{jalink|village shrine|Q134917284}}. === History === === Outline === This place is said to have once been the site of Osata-no-Sakitama-no-miya, a palace of {{jalink|Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637}}, and the shrine is said to mark where the {{jalink|Himatsuri-be|Q109597716|Hinomatsuri-be}} established by Bidatsu was placed (though there is also a theory that Osata-no-Sakitama-no-miya was at {{jalink|Kasuga Shrine (Sakurai)||Kasuga Shrine}} in Kaijū, Sakurai). In the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}} it was listed as a great shrine, but afterward it disappears from historical records; in the {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}} it called itself Kasuga Shrine. === Court rank === *{{jalink|Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|Ten'an}} 3 ({{jalink|859|Q23897}}), {{jalink|January 27|Q2284}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Lower to Junior Fifth Upper (''{{jalink|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981}}'') - written as “Osada Amateru-Mitama-no-Kami” === Enshrined deity === '''Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto'''
There are various theories on the deity’s identity. * ''Jingi Hōten'': aramitama of Amaterasu Ōmikami * ''{{jalink|Jinja Kakuroku|Q11590708}}'': Ama-no-hi-no-kami-no-Mikoto * ''{{jalink|Jinmyōchō Kōshō|Q11588824}}'': Amateru-kuni-teru-hiko-hoakari-no-Mikoto / Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto, ancestor of the Shiki clan * ''{{jalink|Tokusen Jinmyōchō|Q11571092}}'': {{jalink|Ame-no-Hoakari-no-Mikoto|Q10940411}} === Related items === *{{jalink|Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637}} === Access === *About 300 m from {{jalink|Makimuku Station|Q4980794}} on the JR Sakurai Line (west adjacent to the Tsuji area of the {{jalink|Makimuku ruins}}) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *{{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031105-01.html |title=Osada Nimasu Amateru-Mitama Shrine |date=20181001130453}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

Haiden (worship hall)
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270|frame-height=240}} |所在地= {{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}{{jalink|Sakurai|Q127026}} Ōta 205 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 32 | 緯度秒 = 45.8 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 50 | 経度秒 = 21 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神= {{jalink|Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto||Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto}} |社格= {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (great shrine) {{jalink|candidate shrine|Q135022904}}
former {{jalink|village shrine|Q134917284}} |創建=(trad.) {{jalink|Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637}} 11 ({{jalink|586|Q32151}}) |本殿= {{jalink|Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781}} |例祭= {{jalink|October 10|Q2921}} |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社 DOPuNorU8AEd73Q.jpg|none|thumb|250px|Distant view of the shrine]]}} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社本殿 - DCH56w0VoAAUHDH.jpg|none|thumb|250px|Honden]]}} '''Osada Nimasu Amateru-Mitama Shrine''' (おさだにますあまてるみたまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Sakurai|Q127026}}, {{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}. It is a {{jalink|shikinaisha great shrine|Q134917288}}, and its former {{jalink|shrine rank|Q10444029}} was {{jalink|village shrine|Q134917284}}. === History === === Outline === This place is said to have once been the site of Osata-no-Sakitama-no-miya, a palace of {{jalink|Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637}}, and the shrine is said to mark where the {{jalink|Himatsuri-be|Q109597716|Hinomatsuri-be}} established by Bidatsu was placed (though there is also a theory that Osata-no-Sakitama-no-miya was at {{jalink|Kasuga Shrine (Sakurai)||Kasuga Shrine}} in Kaijū, Sakurai). In the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}} it was listed as a great shrine, but afterward it disappears from historical records; in the {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}} it called itself Kasuga Shrine. === Court rank === *{{jalink|Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|Ten'an}} 3 ({{jalink|859|Q23897}}), {{jalink|January 27|Q2284}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Lower to Junior Fifth Upper (''{{jalink|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981}}'') - written as “Osada Amateru-Mitama-no-Kami” === Enshrined deity === '''Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto'''
There are various theories on the deity’s identity. * ''Jingi Hōten'': aramitama of Amaterasu Ōmikami * ''{{jalink|Jinja Kakuroku|Q11590708}}'': Ama-no-hi-no-kami-no-Mikoto * ''{{jalink|Jinmyōchō Kōshō|Q11588824}}'': Amateru-kuni-teru-hiko-hoakari-no-Mikoto / Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto, ancestor of the Shiki clan * ''{{jalink|Tokusen Jinmyōchō|Q11571092}}'': {{jalink|Ame-no-Hoakari-no-Mikoto|Q10940411}} === Related items === *{{jalink|Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637}} === Access === *About 300 m from {{jalink|Makimuku Station|Q4980794}} on the JR Sakurai Line (west adjacent to the Tsuji area of the {{jalink|Makimuku ruins}}) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *{{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031105-01.html |title=Osada Nimasu Amateru-Mitama Shrine |date=20181001130453}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

Ollama and DeepSeek were too bad to actually use. see categorization since some of them are very questionable, especially if there was a massive decrease in page size or the {{jawiki| template is minimal or absent on the page

Haiden (worship hall)
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270|frame-height=240}} |所在地= {{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}{{jalink|Sakurai|Q127026}} Ōta 205 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 32 | 緯度秒 = 45.8 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 50 | 経度秒 = 21 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神= {{jalink|Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto||Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto}} |社格= {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (great shrine) {{jalink|candidate shrine|Q135022904}}
former {{jalink|village shrine|Q134917284}} |創建=(trad.) {{jalink|Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637}} 11 ({{jalink|586|Q32151}}) |本殿= {{jalink|Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781}} |例祭= {{jalink|October 10|Q2921}} |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社 DOPuNorU8AEd73Q.jpg|none|thumb|250px|Distant view of the shrine]]}} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社本殿 - DCH56w0VoAAUHDH.jpg|none|thumb|250px|Honden]]}} '''Osada Nimasu Amateru-Mitama Shrine''' (おさだにますあまてるみたまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Sakurai|Q127026}}, {{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}. It is a {{jalink|shikinaisha great shrine|Q134917288}}, and its former {{jalink|shrine rank|Q10444029}} was {{jalink|village shrine|Q134917284}}. === History === === Outline === This place is said to have once been the site of Osata-no-Sakitama-no-miya, a palace of {{jalink|Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637}}, and the shrine is said to mark where the {{jalink|Himatsuri-be|Q109597716|Hinomatsuri-be}} established by Bidatsu was placed (though there is also a theory that Osata-no-Sakitama-no-miya was at {{jalink|Kasuga Shrine (Sakurai)||Kasuga Shrine}} in Kaijū, Sakurai). In the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}} it was listed as a great shrine, but afterward it disappears from historical records; in the {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}} it called itself Kasuga Shrine. === Court rank === *{{jalink|Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|Ten'an}} 3 ({{jalink|859|Q23897}}), {{jalink|January 27|Q2284}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Lower to Junior Fifth Upper (''{{jalink|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981}}'') - written as “Osada Amateru-Mitama-no-Kami” === Enshrined deity === '''Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto'''
There are various theories on the deity’s identity. * ''Jingi Hōten'': aramitama of Amaterasu Ōmikami * ''{{jalink|Jinja Kakuroku|Q11590708}}'': Ama-no-hi-no-kami-no-Mikoto * ''{{jalink|Jinmyōchō Kōshō|Q11588824}}'': Amateru-kuni-teru-hiko-hoakari-no-Mikoto / Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto, ancestor of the Shiki clan * ''{{jalink|Tokusen Jinmyōchō|Q11571092}}'': {{jalink|Ame-no-Hoakari-no-Mikoto|Q10940411}} === Related items === *{{jalink|Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637}} === Access === *About 300 m from {{jalink|Makimuku Station|Q4980794}} on the JR Sakurai Line (west adjacent to the Tsuji area of the {{jalink|Makimuku ruins}}) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *{{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031105-01.html |title=Osada Nimasu Amateru-Mitama Shrine |date=20181001130453}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

Amateru-Mitama Shrine |画像= [[Image:他田坐天照御魂神社 - DCH56BGVoAAu3-m.jpg|270px]]
Haiden (worship hall)
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270|frame-height=240}} |所在地= {{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}{{jalink|Sakurai|Q127026}} Ōta 205 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 32 | 緯度秒 = 45.8 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 50 | 経度秒 = 21 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神= {{jalink|Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto||Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto}} |社格= {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (great shrine) {{jalink|candidate shrine|Q135022904}}
former {{jalink|village shrine|Q134917284}} |創建=(trad.) {{jalink|Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637}} 11 ({{jalink|586|Q32151}}) |本殿= {{jalink|Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781}} |例祭= {{jalink|October 10|Q2921}} |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社 DOPuNorU8AEd73Q.jpg|none|thumb|250px|Distant view of the shrine]]}} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社本殿 - DCH56w0VoAAUHDH.jpg|none|thumb|250px|Honden]]}} '''Osada Nimasu Amateru-Mitama Shrine''' (おさだにますあまてるみたまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Sakurai|Q127026}}, {{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}. It is a {{jalink|shikinaisha great shrine|Q134917288}}, and its former {{jalink|shrine rank|Q10444029}} was {{jalink|village shrine|Q134917284}}. === History === === Outline === This place is said to have once been the site of Osata-no-Sakitama-no-miya, a palace of {{jalink|Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637}}, and the shrine is said to mark where the {{jalink|Himatsuri-be|Q109597716|Hinomatsuri-be}} established by Bidatsu was placed (though there is also a theory that Osata-no-Sakitama-no-miya was at {{jalink|Kasuga Shrine (Sakurai)||Kasuga Shrine}} in Kaijū, Sakurai). In the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}} it was listed as a great shrine, but afterward it disappears from historical records; in the {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}} it called itself Kasuga Shrine. === Court rank === *{{jalink|Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|Ten'an}} 3 ({{jalink|859|Q23897}}), {{jalink|January 27|Q2284}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Lower to Junior Fifth Upper (''{{jalink|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981}}'') - written as “Osada Amateru-Mitama-no-Kami” === Enshrined deity === '''Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto'''
There are various theories on the deity’s identity. * ''Jingi Hōten'': aramitama of Amaterasu Ōmikami * ''{{jalink|Jinja Kakuroku|Q11590708}}'': Ama-no-hi-no-kami-no-Mikoto * ''{{jalink|Jinmyōchō Kōshō|Q11588824}}'': Amateru-kuni-teru-hiko-hoakari-no-Mikoto / Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto, ancestor of the Shiki clan * ''{{jalink|Tokusen Jinmyōchō|Q11571092}}'': {{jalink|Ame-no-Hoakari-no-Mikoto|Q10940411}} === Related items === *{{jalink|Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637}} === Access === *About 300 m from {{jalink|Makimuku Station|Q4980794}} on the JR Sakurai Line (west adjacent to the Tsuji area of the {{jalink|Makimuku ruins}}) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *{{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031105-01.html |title=Osada Nimasu Amateru-Mitama Shrine |date=20181001130453}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]]

former {{jalink|village shrine|Q134917284}} |創建=(trad.) {{jalink|Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637}} 11 ({{jalink|586|Q32151}}) |本殿= {{jalink|Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781}} |例祭= {{jalink|October 10|Q2921}} |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社 DOPuNorU8AEd73Q.jpg|none|thumb|250px|Distant view of the shrine]]}} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社本殿 - DCH56w0VoAAUHDH.jpg|none|thumb|250px|Honden]]}} '''Osada Nimasu Amateru-Mitama Shrine''' (おさだにますあまてるみたまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Sakurai|Q127026}}, {{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}. It is a {{jalink|shikinaisha great shrine|Q134917288}}, and its former {{jalink|shrine rank|Q10444029}} was {{jalink|village shrine|Q134917284}}. === History === === Outline === This place is said to have once been the site of Osata-no-Sakitama-no-miya, a palace of {{jalink|Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637}}, and the shrine is said to mark where the {{jalink|Himatsuri-be|Q109597716|Hinomatsuri-be}} established by Bidatsu was placed (though there is also a theory that Osata-no-Sakitama-no-miya was at {{jalink|Kasuga Shrine (Sakurai)||Kasuga Shrine}} in Kaijū, Sakurai). In the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}} it was listed as a great shrine, but afterward it disappears from historical records; in the {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}} it called itself Kasuga Shrine. === Court rank === *{{jalink|Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|Ten'an}} 3 ({{jalink|859|Q23897}}), {{jalink|January 27|Q2284}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Lower to Junior Fifth Upper (''{{jalink|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981}}'') - written as “Osada Amateru-Mitama-no-Kami” === Enshrined deity === '''Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto'''
There are various theories on the deity’s identity. * ''Jingi Hōten'': aramitama of Amaterasu Ōmikami * ''{{jalink|Jinja Kakuroku|Q11590708}}'': Ama-no-hi-no-kami-no-Mikoto * ''{{jalink|Jinmyōchō Kōshō|Q11588824}}'': Amateru-kuni-teru-hiko-hoakari-no-Mikoto / Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto, ancestor of the Shiki clan * ''{{jalink|Tokusen Jinmyōchō|Q11571092}}'': {{jalink|Ame-no-Hoakari-no-Mikoto|Q10940411}} === Related items === *{{jalink|Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637}} === Access === *About 300 m from {{jalink|Makimuku Station|Q4980794}} on the JR Sakurai Line (west adjacent to the Tsuji area of the {{jalink|Makimuku ruins}}) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *{{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031105-01.html |title=Osada Nimasu Amateru-Mitama Shrine |date=20181001130453}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

former {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建=(trad.) {{ill|lt=Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637|WD=Q316637}} 11 ({{ill|lt=586|Q32151|WD=Q32151}}) |本殿= {{ill|lt=Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781|WD=Q3193781}} |例祭= {{ill|lt=October 10|Q2921|WD=Q2921}} |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社 DOPuNorU8AEd73Q.jpg|none|thumb|250px|Distant view of the shrine]]}} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社本殿 - DCH56w0VoAAUHDH.jpg|none|thumb|250px|Honden]]}} '''Osada Nimasu Amateru-Mitama Shrine''' (おさだにますあまてるみたまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Sakurai|Q127026|WD=Q127026}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287}}. It is a {{ill|lt=shikinaisha great shrine|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288}}, and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029}} was {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === History === === Outline === This place is said to have once been the site of Osata-no-Sakitama-no-miya, a palace of {{ill|lt=Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637|WD=Q316637}}, and the shrine is said to mark where the {{ill|lt=Himatsuri-be|Q109597716|WD=Q109597716|lt=Hinomatsuri-be}} established by Bidatsu was placed (though there is also a theory that Osata-no-Sakitama-no-miya was at {{ill|lt=Kasuga Shrine (Sakurai)||WD=|lt=Kasuga Shrine}} in Kaijū, Sakurai). In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}} it was listed as a great shrine, but afterward it disappears from historical records; in the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963}} it called itself Kasuga Shrine. === Court rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Lower to Junior Fifth Upper (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981}}'') - written as “Osada Amateru-Mitama-no-Kami” === Enshrined deity === '''Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto'''
There are various theories on the deity’s identity. * ''Jingi Hōten'': aramitama of Amaterasu Ōmikami * ''{{ill|lt=Jinja Kakuroku|Q11590708|WD=Q11590708}}'': Ama-no-hi-no-kami-no-Mikoto * ''{{ill|lt=Jinmyōchō Kōshō|Q11588824|WD=Q11588824}}'': Amateru-kuni-teru-hiko-hoakari-no-Mikoto / Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto, ancestor of the Shiki clan * ''{{ill|lt=Tokusen Jinmyōchō|Q11571092|WD=Q11571092}}'': {{ill|lt=Ame-no-Hoakari-no-Mikoto|Q10940411|WD=Q10940411}} === Related items === *{{ill|lt=Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637|WD=Q316637}} === Access === *About 300 m from {{ill|lt=Makimuku Station|Q4980794|WD=Q4980794}} on the JR Sakurai Line (west adjacent to the Tsuji area of the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Makimuku ruins|UNKNOWN}}) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *{{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031105-01.html |title=Osada Nimasu Amateru-Mitama Shrine |date=20181001130453}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270|frame-height=240}} |所在地= {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287}}{{ill|lt=Sakurai|Q127026|WD=Q127026}} Ōta 205 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 32 | 緯度秒 = 45.8 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 50 | 経度秒 = 21 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神= {{ill|lt=Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN|WD=|lt=Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto}} |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN}} (great shrine) {{ill|lt=candidate shrine|Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}}
former {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建=(trad.) {{ill|lt=Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637|WD=Q316637}} 11 ({{ill|lt=586|Q32151|WD=Q32151}}) |本殿= {{ill|lt=Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781|WD=Q3193781}} |例祭= {{ill|lt=October 10|Q2921|WD=Q2921}} |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社 DOPuNorU8AEd73Q.jpg|none|thumb|250px|Distant view of the shrine]]}} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社本殿 - DCH56w0VoAAUHDH.jpg|none|thumb|250px|Honden]]}} '''Osada Nimasu Amateru-Mitama Shrine''' (おさだにますあまてるみたまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Sakurai|Q127026|WD=Q127026}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287}}. It is a {{ill|lt=shikinaisha great shrine|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288}}, and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029}} was {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === History === === Outline === This place is said to have once been the site of Osata-no-Sakitama-no-miya, a palace of {{ill|lt=Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637|WD=Q316637}}, and the shrine is said to mark where the {{ill|lt=Himatsuri-be|Q109597716|WD=Q109597716|lt=Hinomatsuri-be}} established by Bidatsu was placed (though there is also a theory that Osata-no-Sakitama-no-miya was at {{ill|lt=Kasuga Shrine (Sakurai)|UNKNOWN|WD=|lt=Kasuga Shrine}} in Kaijū, Sakurai). In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}} it was listed as a great shrine, but afterward it disappears from historical records; in the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963}} it called itself Kasuga Shrine. === Court rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Lower to Junior Fifth Upper (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981}}'') - written as “Osada Amateru-Mitama-no-Kami” === Enshrined deity === '''Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto'''
There are various theories on the deity’s identity. * ''Jingi Hōten'': aramitama of Amaterasu Ōmikami * ''{{ill|lt=Jinja Kakuroku|Q11590708|WD=Q11590708}}'': Ama-no-hi-no-kami-no-Mikoto * ''{{ill|lt=Jinmyōchō Kōshō|Q11588824|WD=Q11588824}}'': Amateru-kuni-teru-hiko-hoakari-no-Mikoto / Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto, ancestor of the Shiki clan * ''{{ill|lt=Tokusen Jinmyōchō|Q11571092|WD=Q11571092}}'': {{ill|lt=Ame-no-Hoakari-no-Mikoto|Q10940411|WD=Q10940411}} === Related items === *{{ill|lt=Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637|WD=Q316637}} === Access === *About 300 m from {{ill|lt=Makimuku Station|Q4980794|WD=Q4980794}} on the JR Sakurai Line (west adjacent to the Tsuji area of the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Makimuku ruins|1=UNKNOWN}}) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *{{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031105-01.html |title=Osada Nimasu Amateru-Mitama Shrine |date=20181001130453}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270|frame-height=240}} |所在地= {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287}}{{ill|lt=Sakurai|Q127026|WD=Q127026}} Ōta 205 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 32 | 緯度秒 = 45.8 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 50 | 経度秒 = 21 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神= {{ill|lt=Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN|lt=Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto}} |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} (great shrine) {{ill|lt=candidate shrine|Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}}
former {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建=(trad.) {{ill|lt=Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637|WD=Q316637}} 11 ({{ill|lt=586|Q32151|WD=Q32151}}) |本殿= {{ill|lt=Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781|WD=Q3193781}} |例祭= {{ill|lt=October 10|Q2921|WD=Q2921}} |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社 DOPuNorU8AEd73Q.jpg|none|thumb|250px|Distant view of the shrine]]}} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社本殿 - DCH56w0VoAAUHDH.jpg|none|thumb|250px|Honden]]}} '''Osada Nimasu Amateru-Mitama Shrine''' (おさだにますあまてるみたまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Sakurai|Q127026|WD=Q127026}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287}}. It is a {{ill|lt=shikinaisha great shrine|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288}}, and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029}} was {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === History === === Outline === This place is said to have once been the site of Osata-no-Sakitama-no-miya, a palace of {{ill|lt=Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637|WD=Q316637}}, and the shrine is said to mark where the {{ill|lt=Himatsuri-be|Q109597716|WD=Q109597716|lt=Hinomatsuri-be}} established by Bidatsu was placed (though there is also a theory that Osata-no-Sakitama-no-miya was at {{ill|lt=Kasuga Shrine (Sakurai)|UNKNOWN|lt=Kasuga Shrine}} in Kaijū, Sakurai). In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}} it was listed as a great shrine, but afterward it disappears from historical records; in the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963}} it called itself Kasuga Shrine. === Court rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Lower to Junior Fifth Upper (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981}}'') - written as “Osada Amateru-Mitama-no-Kami” === Enshrined deity === '''Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto'''
There are various theories on the deity’s identity. * ''Jingi Hōten'': aramitama of Amaterasu Ōmikami * ''{{ill|lt=Jinja Kakuroku|Q11590708|WD=Q11590708}}'': Ama-no-hi-no-kami-no-Mikoto * ''{{ill|lt=Jinmyōchō Kōshō|Q11588824|WD=Q11588824}}'': Amateru-kuni-teru-hiko-hoakari-no-Mikoto / Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto, ancestor of the Shiki clan * ''{{ill|lt=Tokusen Jinmyōchō|Q11571092|WD=Q11571092}}'': {{ill|lt=Ame-no-Hoakari-no-Mikoto|Q10940411|WD=Q10940411}} === Related items === *{{ill|lt=Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637|WD=Q316637}} === Access === *About 300 m from {{ill|lt=Makimuku Station|Q4980794|WD=Q4980794}} on the JR Sakurai Line (west adjacent to the Tsuji area of the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Makimuku ruins|1=UNKNOWN}}) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *{{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031105-01.html |title=Osada Nimasu Amateru-Mitama Shrine |date=20181001130453}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

DCH56BGVoAAu3-m.jpg|270px]]
Haiden (worship hall)
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270|frame-height=240}} |所在地= {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Sakurai|Q127026|WD=Q127026|1=Sakurai, Nara}} Ōta 205 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 32 | 緯度秒 = 45.8 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 50 | 経度秒 = 21 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神= {{ill|lt=Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN|lt=Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto}} |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} (great shrine) {{ill|lt=candidate shrine|Q135022904|WD=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
former {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建=(trad.) {{ill|lt=Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637|WD=Q316637|1=Emperor Bidatsu}} 11 ({{ill|lt=586|Q32151|WD=Q32151|1=586}}) |本殿= {{ill|lt=Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781|WD=Q3193781|1=Kasuga-zukuri}} |例祭= {{ill|lt=October 10|Q2921|WD=Q2921|1=October 10}} |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社 DOPuNorU8AEd73Q.jpg|none|thumb|250px|Distant view of the shrine]]}} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社本殿 - DCH56w0VoAAUHDH.jpg|none|thumb|250px|Honden]]}} '''Osada Nimasu Amateru-Mitama Shrine''' (おさだにますあまてるみたまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Sakurai|Q127026|WD=Q127026|1=Sakurai, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|lt=shikinaisha great shrine|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}}, and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === History === === Outline === This place is said to have once been the site of Osata-no-Sakitama-no-miya, a palace of {{ill|lt=Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637|WD=Q316637|1=Emperor Bidatsu}}, and the shrine is said to mark where the {{ill|lt=Himatsuri-be|Q109597716|WD=Q109597716|lt=Hinomatsuri-be|1=Hinomatsuri-be}} established by Bidatsu was placed (though there is also a theory that Osata-no-Sakitama-no-miya was at {{ill|lt=Kasuga Shrine (Sakurai)|UNKNOWN|lt=Kasuga Shrine}} in Kaijū, Sakurai). In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was listed as a great shrine, but afterward it disappears from historical records; in the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963|1=Edo period}} it called itself Kasuga Shrine. === Court rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Lower to Junior Fifth Upper (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') - written as “Osada Amateru-Mitama-no-Kami” === Enshrined deity === '''Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto'''
There are various theories on the deity’s identity. * ''Jingi Hōten'': aramitama of Amaterasu Ōmikami * ''{{ill|lt=Jinja Kakuroku|Q11590708|WD=Q11590708|1=Jinja Kakuroku}}'': Ama-no-hi-no-kami-no-Mikoto * ''{{ill|lt=Jinmyōchō Kōshō|Q11588824|WD=Q11588824|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō Studies}}'': Amateru-kuni-teru-hiko-hoakari-no-Mikoto / Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto, ancestor of the Shiki clan * ''{{ill|lt=Tokusen Jinmyōchō|Q11571092|WD=Q11571092|1=Tokusen Jinmyōchō}}'': {{ill|lt=Ame-no-Hoakari-no-Mikoto|Q10940411|WD=Q10940411|1=Amenohoakari}} === Related items === *{{ill|lt=Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637|WD=Q316637|1=Emperor Bidatsu}} === Access === *About 300 m from {{ill|lt=Makimuku Station|Q4980794|WD=Q4980794|1=Makimuku Station}} on the JR Sakurai Line (west adjacent to the Tsuji area of the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Makimuku ruins|1=UNKNOWN}}) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *{{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031105-01.html |title=Osada Nimasu Amateru-Mitama Shrine |date=20181001130453}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

Haiden (worship hall)
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270|frame-height=240}} |所在地= {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Sakurai|Q127026|WD=Q127026|1=Sakurai, Nara}} Ōta 205 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 32 | 緯度秒 = 45.8 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 50 | 経度秒 = 21 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神= {{ill|lt=Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN|lt=Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto}} |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} (great shrine) {{ill|lt=candidate shrine|Q135022904|WD=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
former {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建=(trad.) {{ill|lt=Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637|WD=Q316637|1=Emperor Bidatsu}} 11 ({{ill|lt=586|Q32151|WD=Q32151|1=586}}) |本殿= {{ill|lt=Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781|WD=Q3193781|1=Kasuga-zukuri}} |例祭= {{ill|lt=October 10|Q2921|WD=Q2921|1=October 10}} |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社 DOPuNorU8AEd73Q.jpg|none|thumb|250px|Distant view of the shrine]]}} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社本殿 - DCH56w0VoAAUHDH.jpg|none|thumb|250px|Honden]]}} '''Osada Nimasu Amateru-Mitama Shrine''' (おさだにますあまてるみたまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Sakurai|Q127026|WD=Q127026|1=Sakurai, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|lt=shikinaisha great shrine|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}}, and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === History === === Outline === This place is said to have once been the site of Osata-no-Sakitama-no-miya, a palace of {{ill|lt=Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637|WD=Q316637|1=Emperor Bidatsu}}, and the shrine is said to mark where the {{ill|lt=Himatsuri-be|Q109597716|WD=Q109597716|lt=Hinomatsuri-be|1=Hinomatsuri-be}} established by Bidatsu was placed (though there is also a theory that Osata-no-Sakitama-no-miya was at {{ill|lt=Kasuga Shrine (Sakurai)|UNKNOWN|lt=Kasuga Shrine}} in Kaijū, Sakurai). In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was listed as a great shrine, but afterward it disappears from historical records; in the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963|1=Edo period}} it called itself Kasuga Shrine. === Court rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Lower to Junior Fifth Upper (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') - written as “Osada Amateru-Mitama-no-Kami” === Enshrined deity === '''Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto'''
There are various theories on the deity’s identity. * ''Jingi Hōten'': aramitama of Amaterasu Ōmikami * ''{{ill|lt=Jinja Kakuroku|Q11590708|WD=Q11590708|1=Jinja Kakuroku}}'': Ama-no-hi-no-kami-no-Mikoto * ''{{ill|lt=Jinmyōchō Kōshō|Q11588824|WD=Q11588824|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō Studies}}'': Amateru-kuni-teru-hiko-hoakari-no-Mikoto / Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto, ancestor of the Shiki clan * ''{{ill|lt=Tokusen Jinmyōchō|Q11571092|WD=Q11571092|1=Tokusen Jinmyōchō}}'': {{ill|lt=Ame-no-Hoakari-no-Mikoto|Q10940411|WD=Q10940411|1=Amenohoakari}} === Related items === *{{ill|lt=Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637|WD=Q316637|1=Emperor Bidatsu}} === Access === *About 300 m from {{ill|lt=Makimuku Station|Q4980794|WD=Q4980794|1=Makimuku Station}} on the JR Sakurai Line (west adjacent to the Tsuji area of the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Makimuku ruins|1=UNKNOWN}}) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *{{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031105-01.html |title=Osada Nimasu Amateru-Mitama Shrine |date=20181001130453}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

DCH56BGVoAAu3-m.jpg|270px]]
Haiden (worship hall)
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270|frame-height=240}} |所在地= {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Sakurai|Q127026|WD=Q127026|1=Sakurai, Nara}} Ōta 205 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 32 | 緯度秒 = 45.8 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 50 | 経度秒 = 21 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神= {{ill|lt=Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN|lt=Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto}} |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} (great shrine) {{ill|lt=candidate shrine|Q135022904|WD=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
former {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建=(trad.) {{ill|lt=Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637|WD=Q316637|1=Emperor Bidatsu}} 11 ({{ill|lt=586|Q32151|WD=Q32151|1=586}}) |本殿= {{ill|lt=Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781|WD=Q3193781|1=Kasuga-zukuri}} |例祭= {{ill|lt=October 10|Q2921|WD=Q2921|1=October 10}} |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社 DOPuNorU8AEd73Q.jpg|none|thumb|250px|Distant view of the shrine]]}} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社本殿 - DCH56w0VoAAUHDH.jpg|none|thumb|250px|Honden]]}} '''Osada Nimasu Amateru-Mitama Shrine''' (おさだにますあまてるみたまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Sakurai|Q127026|WD=Q127026|1=Sakurai, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|lt=shikinaisha great shrine|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}}, and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === History === === Outline === This place is said to have once been the site of Osata-no-Sakitama-no-miya, a palace of {{ill|lt=Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637|WD=Q316637|1=Emperor Bidatsu}}, and the shrine is said to mark where the {{ill|lt=Himatsuri-be|Q109597716|WD=Q109597716|lt=Hinomatsuri-be|1=Hinomatsuri-be}} established by Bidatsu was placed (though there is also a theory that Osata-no-Sakitama-no-miya was at {{ill|lt=Kasuga Shrine (Sakurai)|UNKNOWN|lt=Kasuga Shrine}} in Kaijū, Sakurai). In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was listed as a great shrine, but afterward it disappears from historical records; in the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963|1=Edo period}} it called itself Kasuga Shrine. === Court rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Lower to Junior Fifth Upper (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') - written as “Osada Amateru-Mitama-no-Kami” === Enshrined deity === '''Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto'''
There are various theories on the deity’s identity. * ''Jingi Hōten'': aramitama of Amaterasu Ōmikami * ''{{ill|lt=Jinja Kakuroku|Q11590708|WD=Q11590708|1=Jinja Kakuroku}}'': Ama-no-hi-no-kami-no-Mikoto * ''{{ill|lt=Jinmyōchō Kōshō|Q11588824|WD=Q11588824|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō Studies}}'': Amateru-kuni-teru-hiko-hoakari-no-Mikoto / Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto, ancestor of the Shiki clan * ''{{ill|lt=Tokusen Jinmyōchō|Q11571092|WD=Q11571092|1=Tokusen Jinmyōchō}}'': {{ill|lt=Ame-no-Hoakari-no-Mikoto|Q10940411|WD=Q10940411|1=Amenohoakari}} === Related items === *{{ill|lt=Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637|WD=Q316637|1=Emperor Bidatsu}} === Access === *About 300 m from {{ill|lt=Makimuku Station|Q4980794|WD=Q4980794|1=Makimuku Station}} on the JR Sakurai Line (west adjacent to the Tsuji area of the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Makimuku ruins|1=UNKNOWN}}) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *{{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031105-01.html |title=Osada Nimasu Amateru-Mitama Shrine |date=20181001130453}} {{神道 横}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社|大おさたにますあまてるみたましんしや]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

It is a {{ill|lt=shikinaisha great shrine|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}}, and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === History === === Outline === This place is said to have once been the site of Osata-no-Sakitama-no-miya, a palace of {{ill|lt=Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637|WD=Q316637|1=Emperor Bidatsu}}, and the shrine is said to mark where the {{ill|lt=Himatsuri-be|Q109597716|WD=Q109597716|lt=Hinomatsuri-be|1=Hinomatsuri-be}} established by Bidatsu was placed (though there is also a theory that Osata-no-Sakitama-no-miya was at {{ill|lt=Kasuga Shrine (Sakurai)|UNKNOWN|lt=Kasuga Shrine}} in Kaijū, Sakurai). In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was listed as a great shrine, but afterward it disappears from historical records; in the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963|1=Edo period}} it called itself Kasuga Shrine. === Court rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Lower to Junior Fifth Upper (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') - written as “Osada Amateru-Mitama-no-Kami” === Enshrined deity === '''Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto'''
There are various theories on the deity’s identity. * ''Jingi Hōten'': aramitama of Amaterasu Ōmikami * ''{{ill|lt=Jinja Kakuroku|Q11590708|WD=Q11590708|1=Jinja Kakuroku}}'': Ama-no-hi-no-kami-no-Mikoto * ''{{ill|lt=Jinmyōchō Kōshō|Q11588824|WD=Q11588824|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō Studies}}'': Amateru-kuni-teru-hiko-hoakari-no-Mikoto / Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto, ancestor of the Shiki clan * ''{{ill|lt=Tokusen Jinmyōchō|Q11571092|WD=Q11571092|1=Tokusen Jinmyōchō}}'': {{ill|lt=Ame-no-Hoakari-no-Mikoto|Q10940411|WD=Q10940411|1=Amenohoakari}} === Related items === *{{ill|lt=Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637|WD=Q316637|1=Emperor Bidatsu}} === Access === *About 300 m from {{ill|lt=Makimuku Station|Q4980794|WD=Q4980794|1=Makimuku Station}} on the JR Sakurai Line (west adjacent to the Tsuji area of the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Makimuku ruins|1=UNKNOWN}}) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *{{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031105-01.html |title=Osada Nimasu Amateru-Mitama Shrine |date=20181001130453}} {{神道 横}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was listed as a great shrine, but afterward it disappears from historical records; in the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963|1=Edo period}} it called itself Kasuga Shrine. === Court rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Lower to Junior Fifth Upper (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') - written as “Osada Amateru-Mitama-no-Kami” === Enshrined deity === '''Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto'''

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270|frame-height=240}} |所在地= {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Sakurai|Q127026|WD=Q127026|1=Sakurai, Nara}} Ōta 205 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 32 | 緯度秒 = 45.8 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 50 | 経度秒 = 21 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神= {{ill|lt=Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN|lt=Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto}} |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} (great shrine) {{ill|lt=candidate shrine|Q135022904|WD=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
former {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建=(trad.) {{ill|lt=Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637|WD=Q316637|1=Emperor Bidatsu}} 11 ({{ill|lt=586|Q32151|WD=Q32151|1=586}}) |本殿= {{ill|lt=Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781|WD=Q3193781|1=Kasuga-zukuri}} |例祭= {{ill|lt=October 10|Q2921|WD=Q2921|1=October 10}} |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社 DOPuNorU8AEd73Q.jpg|none|thumb|250px|Distant view of the shrine]]}} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社本殿 - DCH56w0VoAAUHDH.jpg|none|thumb|250px|Honden]]}} '''Osada Nimasu Amateru-Mitama Shrine''' (おさだにますあまてるみたまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Sakurai|Q127026|WD=Q127026|1=Sakurai, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|lt=shikinaisha great shrine|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}}, and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === History === === Outline === This place is said to have once been the site of Osata-no-Sakitama-no-miya, a palace of {{ill|lt=Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637|WD=Q316637|1=Emperor Bidatsu}}, and the shrine is said to mark where the {{ill|lt=Himatsuri-be|Q109597716|WD=Q109597716|lt=Hinomatsuri-be|1=Hinomatsuri-be}} established by Bidatsu was placed (though there is also a theory that Osata-no-Sakitama-no-miya was at {{ill|lt=Kasuga Shrine (Sakurai)|UNKNOWN|lt=Kasuga Shrine}} in Kaijū, Sakurai). In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was listed as a great shrine, but afterward it disappears from historical records; in the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963|1=Edo period}} it called itself Kasuga Shrine. === Court rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Lower to Junior Fifth Upper (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') - written as “Osada Amateru-Mitama-no-Kami” === Enshrined deity === '''Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto'''
There are various theories on the deity’s identity. * ''Jingi Hōten'': aramitama of Amaterasu Ōmikami * ''{{ill|lt=Jinja Kakuroku|Q11590708|WD=Q11590708|1=Jinja Kakuroku}}'': Ama-no-hi-no-kami-no-Mikoto * ''{{ill|lt=Jinmyōchō Kōshō|Q11588824|WD=Q11588824|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō Studies}}'': Amateru-kuni-teru-hiko-hoakari-no-Mikoto / Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto, ancestor of the Shiki clan * ''{{ill|lt=Tokusen Jinmyōchō|Q11571092|WD=Q11571092|1=Tokusen Jinmyōchō}}'': {{ill|lt=Ame-no-Hoakari-no-Mikoto|Q10940411|WD=Q10940411|1=Amenohoakari}} === Related items === *{{ill|lt=Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637|WD=Q316637|1=Emperor Bidatsu}} === Access === *About 300 m from {{ill|lt=Makimuku Station|Q4980794|WD=Q4980794|1=Makimuku Station}} on the JR Sakurai Line (west adjacent to the Tsuji area of the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Makimuku ruins|1=UNKNOWN}}) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *{{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031105-01.html |title=Osada Nimasu Amateru-Mitama Shrine |date=20181001130453}} {{神道 横}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:桜井市の建築物]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

Haiden (worship hall)
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270|frame-height=240}} |所在地= {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Sakurai|Q127026|WD=Q127026|1=Sakurai, Nara}} Ōta 205 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 32 | 緯度秒 = 45.8 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 50 | 経度秒 = 21 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神= {{ill|lt=Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN|lt=Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto}} |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} (great shrine) {{ill|lt=candidate shrine|Q135022904|WD=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
former {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建=(trad.) {{ill|lt=Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637|WD=Q316637|1=Emperor Bidatsu}} 11 ({{ill|lt=586|Q32151|WD=Q32151|1=586}}) |本殿= {{ill|lt=Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781|WD=Q3193781|1=Kasuga-zukuri}} |例祭= {{ill|lt=October 10|Q2921|WD=Q2921|1=October 10}} |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社 DOPuNorU8AEd73Q.jpg|none|thumb|250px|Distant view of the shrine]]}} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社本殿 - DCH56w0VoAAUHDH.jpg|none|thumb|250px|Honden]]}} '''Osada Nimasu Amateru-Mitama Shrine''' (おさだにますあまてるみたまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Sakurai|Q127026|WD=Q127026|1=Sakurai, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|lt=shikinaisha great shrine|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}}, and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === History === === Outline === This place is said to have once been the site of Osata-no-Sakitama-no-miya, a palace of {{ill|lt=Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637|WD=Q316637|1=Emperor Bidatsu}}, and the shrine is said to mark where the {{ill|lt=Himatsuri-be|Q109597716|WD=Q109597716|lt=Hinomatsuri-be|1=Hinomatsuri-be}} established by Bidatsu was placed (though there is also a theory that Osata-no-Sakitama-no-miya was at {{ill|lt=Kasuga Shrine (Sakurai)|UNKNOWN|lt=Kasuga Shrine}} in Kaijū, Sakurai). In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was listed as a great shrine, but afterward it disappears from historical records; in the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963|1=Edo period}} it called itself Kasuga Shrine. === Court rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Lower to Junior Fifth Upper (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') - written as “Osada Amateru-Mitama-no-Kami” === Enshrined deity === '''Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto'''
There are various theories on the deity’s identity. * ''Jingi Hōten'': aramitama of Amaterasu Ōmikami * ''{{ill|lt=Jinja Kakuroku|Q11590708|WD=Q11590708|1=Jinja Kakuroku}}'': Ama-no-hi-no-kami-no-Mikoto * ''{{ill|lt=Jinmyōchō Kōshō|Q11588824|WD=Q11588824|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō Studies}}'': Amateru-kuni-teru-hiko-hoakari-no-Mikoto / Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto, ancestor of the Shiki clan * ''{{ill|lt=Tokusen Jinmyōchō|Q11571092|WD=Q11571092|1=Tokusen Jinmyōchō}}'': {{ill|lt=Ame-no-Hoakari-no-Mikoto|Q10940411|WD=Q10940411|1=Amenohoakari}} === Related items === *{{ill|lt=Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637|WD=Q316637|1=Emperor Bidatsu}} === Access === *About 300 m from {{ill|lt=Makimuku Station|Q4980794|WD=Q4980794|1=Makimuku Station}} on the JR Sakurai Line (west adjacent to the Tsuji area of the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Makimuku ruins|1=UNKNOWN}}) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *{{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031105-01.html |title=Osada Nimasu Amateru-Mitama Shrine |date=20181001130453}} {{神道 横}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Sakurai]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

Haiden (worship hall)
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270|frame-height=240}} |所在地= {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Sakurai|Q127026|WD=Q127026|1=Sakurai, Nara}} Ōta 205 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 32 | 緯度秒 = 45.8 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 50 | 経度秒 = 21 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神= {{ill|lt=Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN|lt=Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto}} |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} (great shrine) {{ill|lt=candidate shrine|Q135022904|WD=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
former {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建=(trad.) {{ill|lt=Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637|WD=Q316637|1=Emperor Bidatsu}} 11 ({{ill|lt=586|Q32151|WD=Q32151|1=586}}) |本殿= {{ill|lt=Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781|WD=Q3193781|1=Kasuga-zukuri}} |例祭= {{ill|lt=October 10|Q2921|WD=Q2921|1=October 10}} |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社 DOPuNorU8AEd73Q.jpg|none|thumb|250px|Distant view of the shrine]]}} {{右|[[画像:他田坐天照御魂神社本殿 - DCH56w0VoAAUHDH.jpg|none|thumb|250px|Honden]]}} '''Osada Nimasu Amateru-Mitama Shrine''' (おさだにますあまてるみたまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Sakurai|Q127026|WD=Q127026|1=Sakurai, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|lt=shikinaisha great shrine|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}}, and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === History === === Outline === This place is said to have once been the site of Osata-no-Sakitama-no-miya, a palace of {{ill|lt=Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637|WD=Q316637|1=Emperor Bidatsu}}, and the shrine is said to mark where the {{ill|lt=Himatsuri-be|Q109597716|WD=Q109597716|lt=Hinomatsuri-be|1=Hinomatsuri-be}} established by Bidatsu was placed (though there is also a theory that Osata-no-Sakitama-no-miya was at {{ill|lt=Kasuga Shrine (Sakurai)|UNKNOWN|lt=Kasuga Shrine}} in Kaijū, Sakurai). In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} it was listed as a great shrine, but afterward it disappears from historical records; in the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963|1=Edo period}} it called itself Kasuga Shrine. === Court rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Lower to Junior Fifth Upper (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') - written as “Osada Amateru-Mitama-no-Kami” === Enshrined deity === '''Amateru-Mitama-no-Mikoto'''
There are various theories on the deity’s identity. * ''Jingi Hōten'': aramitama of Amaterasu Ōmikami * ''{{ill|lt=Jinja Kakuroku|Q11590708|WD=Q11590708|1=Jinja Kakuroku}}'': Ama-no-hi-no-kami-no-Mikoto * ''{{ill|lt=Jinmyōchō Kōshō|Q11588824|WD=Q11588824|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō Studies}}'': Amateru-kuni-teru-hiko-hoakari-no-Mikoto / Nigihayahi-no-Mikoto, ancestor of the Shiki clan * ''{{ill|lt=Tokusen Jinmyōchō|Q11571092|WD=Q11571092|1=Tokusen Jinmyōchō}}'': {{ill|lt=Ame-no-Hoakari-no-Mikoto|Q10940411|WD=Q10940411|1=Amenohoakari}} === Related items === *{{ill|lt=Emperor Bidatsu|Q316637|WD=Q316637|1=Emperor Bidatsu}} === Access === *About 300 m from {{ill|lt=Makimuku Station|Q4980794|WD=Q4980794|1=Makimuku Station}} on the JR Sakurai Line (west adjacent to the Tsuji area of the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Makimuku ruins|1=UNKNOWN}}) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *{{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031105-01.html |title=Osada Nimasu Amateru-Mitama Shrine |date=20181001130453}} {{神道 横}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Osada Nimasu Amateru Mitama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Sakurai]] [[Category:桜井市の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]]
